ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "is_superhost" INTEGER /* Whether the host is a superhost */,
  "response_rate" TEXT /* Response rate of the host */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Response time of the host */,
  "listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings the host has */,
  "identity_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the host's identity is verified */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the host's profile picture */,
  "about" TEXT /* A brief description of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Host's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Host's physical address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Host's country */,
  "city" TEXT /* Host's city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the property */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "neighbourhood_group_cleansed" TEXT /* Neighbourhood the property is in */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, guest suite) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., entire home/apt, private room) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "guests_included" INTEGER /* Number of guests included in the booking */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms the property has */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms the property has */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds the property has */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., real bed, pull-out sofa) */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Cleaning fee for the property */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for booking */,
  "instant_bookable" INTEGER /* Whether the property is instantly bookable */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the property */,
  "availability_calendar" TEXT /* URL or path to the property's availability calendar */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review for the property */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the property */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon representing the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if the booking is canceled */,
  "guest_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements or notes from the guest */,
  "host_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements or notes from the host */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the guest's profile picture */,
  "about" TEXT /* A brief description of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Guest's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Guest's physical address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Guest's country */,
  "city" TEXT /* Guest's city */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the guest */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host being reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, host, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Whether the user has staff privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
